title: Provision framework_development advisor (template=engineering-advisor)
justification: WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure require dedicated advisors for architecture (archie), history/evolution tracking (historian), and timeline/expedition management (expediter)
perceive: Provision a new 'framework_development' advisor for this spoke. Ozi team-coverage eval identified this as the highest-priority gap. Justification: WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure require dedicated advisors for architecture (archie), history/evolution tracking (historian), and timeline/expedition management (expediter) Hub templates: /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern to follow: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 1. Read /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/engineering-advisor/charter.md. This is the template you will adapt.
2. Set advisor_id='framework_development' (use the domain name exactly — do not reuse or rename existing advisor entries).
3. Create directory WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/ if it does not exist.

4. Write WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md — adapt the engineering-advisor charter: set advisor_id=framework_development, domain=framework_development, mission statement (2 sentences), responsibilities (3-5 bullet points specific to this spoke), escalation-to-Ozi rule. Do NOT copy boilerplate verbatim — tailor to this spoke's goals.
5. STOP AND VERIFY: confirm WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md now exists and is non-empty. If it does not exist, stop — do not proceed.

7. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json: add entry advisor_id=framework_development, status=stub, department_id=engineering, domain=framework_development, initialized_from_template=engineering-advisor. If entry exists, update it. Preserve all other entries.

8. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "framework_development", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.

9. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: in team_coverage.gaps_detected, set the entry with domain=framework_development to proposal_status=provisioned. If team_coverage key is absent, create it.
verify: WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty; WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/scan_state.json exists with status=stub; registry.json has entry advisor_id=framework_development status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry for framework_development; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=framework_development].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for framework_development
completion_notes: Advisor framework_development was already provisioned prior to this lug (initialized 2026-06-12, ran 2026-06-12). Found: context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty (tailored mission/responsibilities/escalation); registry.json entry present with status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry. scan_state.json found with status=active (advisor already ran — left in active state rather than downgrading to stub). Only missing item: ozi/scan_state.json had proposal_status=pending for framework_development; updated to provisioned. All acceptance criteria met or superseded.
